# Step 1 — Stats + Analytics Audit

> **Milestone**: M1.5 | **Epic**: E1.5.1 | **Tasks**: T1.5.1.1.1.1 + T1.5.1.1.1.2
> **Depends on**: nothing
> **Skills to load**: `flutter-testing-apps`, `riverpod-providers`

Load shared context: [M1.5 launch context](../instructions/m1.5-launch-context.instructions.md)

---

## Task

The backlog node E1.5.1 was authored assuming Isar persistence and a fresh
`lib/features/stats/` build-out. The codebase actually ships an equivalent
`AnalyticsService` (SharedPreferences-backed) and a working
`analytics_screen.dart`. Your job is **not** to reimplement — it's to **audit
existing work against acceptance criteria** and produce a one-paragraph
verdict: complete, or here-are-the-gaps.

You may refuse to declare complete if any criterion below cannot be verified
from the source. Refusal output: a numbered list of gaps with file paths and
exact criterion text.

## Files to Audit (read only, do not modify)

- `lib/services/analytics_service.dart`
- `lib/store/analytics_models.dart`
- `lib/screens/analytics_screen.dart`
- `lib/screens/reading_screen.dart` (session lifecycle calls)
- `lib/screens/parallax_reading_screen.dart` (mirror lifecycle)
- `lib/navigation/app_router.dart` (analytics route registered?)

## Acceptance Criteria (from backlog T1.5.1.1.1.1 + T1.5.1.1.1.2)

Verify each, mark ✅ / ❌ with one line of evidence (file:line):

- [ ] Tracks: session duration, words read, WPM average, completion percentage
- [ ] `ReadingSession` model has timestamp + document reference
- [ ] Data stored on-device only — no network calls in `AnalyticsService`
- [ ] Reading session save triggers on pause / dispose / document change
- [ ] Dashboard shows: total sessions, total words read, average session
      duration, streak count
- [ ] All data indicators use shape/label/position (not color-only)
- [ ] Uses `RunThruTokens` and `RunThruTypography` (no raw `Color(0xFF...)` /
      no hardcoded `TextStyle`)
- [ ] Touch targets ≥48dp on any interactive stat elements
- [ ] `dart analyze --fatal-infos lib/services/analytics_service.dart
      lib/store/analytics_models.dart lib/screens/analytics_screen.dart`
      reports zero issues

## Files to Create (only if audit reveals gaps)

If a criterion fails, propose the **minimum** patch in a brief markdown report
at `doc/audits/m1.5-stats-audit.md`. Do not edit Dart source unless explicitly
asked in a follow-up.

## Verification

```pwsh
dart analyze --fatal-infos lib/services/analytics_service.dart lib/store/analytics_models.dart lib/screens/analytics_screen.dart
flutter test test/services/ test/store/ test/screens/
```

## Acceptance

- [ ] Audit report (inline in chat) lists every criterion with ✅/❌ and a file:line citation
- [ ] If all ✅: declare E1.5.1 complete and recommend backlog status update
- [ ] If any ❌: list each gap with the exact additional work required (file path, function name, ~line count) — do not fix in this step
- [ ] No source files modified by this prompt
